parents.subject: LU-15543 ldiskfs: rename BIO_MAX_PAGES to BIO_MAX_VECS

commit.subject: LU-15563 ldiskfs: return xattr name from security_dentry_init_security()
commit.message:
LU-15563 ldiskfs: return xattr name from security_dentry_init_security()

Linux v5.15-rc1-20-g15bf32398ad4
   security: Return xattr name from security_dentry_init_security()
Adds an new argument used to return the xattr_name constant.

Linux v5.15-rc6-145-g6b19b766e8f0
   fs: get rid of the res2 iocb->ki_complete argument
Drop the unused second 'res2' argument.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/46779
Lustre-commit: TBD (from b701e4a6cea3b8cad78faf3628b6360117a2f3ab)

Test-Parameters: trivial
HPE-bug-id: LUS-10773
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Iae4fd4448d8a920e4aafd9fd9093518ded44d250
